description: From the manufacturer Hammerite Spray Paint for Metal. Direct to Rust Exterior White Metal Paint, Hammered Finish. Corrosion Resistant White Paint and Rust Remover, 8 Year Protection - 400ml Aerosol 0.5 SqM Coverage​ Hammerite Direct to Rust Metal Paint with a hammered finish is the perfect solution for all your metal painting needs. Whether you're looking to paint a gate, railing, garden furniture or any other metal surface, this versatile metal paint offers long-lasting protection and a hammered effect, professional finish. This innovative metal paint can be applied directly to rust, eliminating the need for a rust converter or rust remover. It's specially formulated to bond with rusty metal, creating a durable barrier that helps prevent rust from re-forming. The rust resistant paint dries to a hammered effect finish that's perfect for a variety of metal surfaces. Available in a range of colors, including black, silver, gold, green, white, and more, Hammerite Direct to Rust Metal Paint offers a wide range of design possibilities. Whether you're looking for a black gloss paint for your fence or a colourful paint for your metal doors, Hammerite has you covered. The black metal paint is also a great choice for creating a bold, modern look, while the silver and gold paints offer a more traditional metallic look. In addition to its superior performance and durability, Hammerite Direct to Rust Metal Paint is also incredibly easy to use. The hammered effect finish dries quickly, making it the perfect choice for those looking to complete their painting project quickly and easily. And with Hammerite's commitment to quality, you can be sure that this white metal paint will provide long-lasting protection and a professional finish for years to come. So if you're looking for a high-quality metal paint that can be applied directly to rust, look no further than Hammerite Direct to Rust Metal Paint. Whether you're a professional painter or a DIY enthusiast, this innovative radiator paint is the perfect solution for all your metal painting needs. Brand Hammerite Color White Finish Type Metal Size 400 Ml (pack Of 1) Item Volume 400.0 Milliliters Hammerite 5092820 Kurust, 250 ml , Blue There is no worse feeling than seeing a rough, orange surface on your car that was once graced by a coat of paint. With British weather guaranteeing rain during all four seasons of the year, your car may already be showing the signs of rusted bodywork. However, rather than go through the costly inconvenience of replacing the panel, Hammerite can provide you a solution.Hammerite Kurust is ideal for small patches of rust. It converts rusty metal to a clean surface in 15 minutes, allowing virtually any topcoat to be applied in 3 hours. Simply apply with a brush and watch the Kurust formula turn blue/black as it reacts with the rust. No undercoat or primer is required. Comes in a 250ml bottle.The Hammerite range is designed to protect metalwork from humidity, rain and rust.
